description: Style NoteThis kurti from aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic that incorporates subtly ethnic design details. Balance the sober patterns with a bright colour pop denims or an intricate stole. We recommend ethnic flats in metallic tones for your feet.Product DetailsPink striped sleeveless kurti with a mandarin collar and a split neckline, has side slitsMaterial and Care100% cotton Wash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
